ApiModelConfig.title: ApiModelConfig
ApiModelConfig.description:
API-specific model configuration.

For API engines, configuration is simpler - just params to send.

engine_type.description: Type of inference engine to use

BaseVlmEngineOptions.title: BaseVlmEngineOptions
BaseVlmEngineOptions.description:
Base configuration for VLM inference engines.

Engine options are independent of model specifications and prompts.
They only control how the inference is executed.

include_converted_doc.title: Include Converted Doc
include_converted_doc.description: If true, the output will include both the chunks and the converted document.

target_type.description: Specification for the type of output target.

convert_from_formats.title: Convert From Formats
convert_from_formats.description: Input format(s) to convert from. String or list of strings. Allowed values: docx, pptx, html, image, pdf, asciidoc, md, csv, xlsx, xml_uspto, xml_jats, xml_xbrl, mets_gbs, json_docling, audio, vtt, latex. Optional, defaults to all formats.

convert_image_export_mode.description: Image export mode for the document (in case of JSON, Markdown or HTML). Allowed values: placeholder, embedded, referenced. Optional, defaults to Embedded.

convert_do_ocr.title: Convert Do Ocr
convert_do_ocr.description: If enabled, the bitmap content will be processed using OCR. Boolean. Optional, defaults to true

convert_force_ocr.title: Convert Force Ocr
convert_force_ocr.description: If enabled, replace existing text with OCR-generated text over content. Boolean. Optional, defaults to false.

convert_ocr_engine.description: The OCR engine to use. String. Allowed values: auto, easyocr, ocrmac, rapidocr, tesserocr, tesseract. Optional, defaults to easyocr.

convert_ocr_lang.title: Convert Ocr Lang
convert_ocr_lang.description: List of languages used by the OCR engine. Note that each OCR engine has different values for the language names. String or list of strings. Optional, defaults to empty.

convert_pdf_backend.description: The PDF backend to use. String. Allowed values: pypdfium2, docling_parse, dlparse_v1, dlparse_v2, dlparse_v4. Optional, defaults to docling_parse.

convert_table_mode.description: Mode to use for table structure, String. Allowed values: fast, accurate. Optional, defaults to accurate.

convert_table_cell_matching.title: Convert Table Cell Matching
convert_table_cell_matching.description: If true, matches table cells predictions back to PDF cells. Can break table output if PDF cells are merged across table columns. If false, let table structure model define the text cells, ignore PDF cells.

convert_pipeline.description: Choose the pipeline to process PDF or image files.

convert_page_range.title: Convert Page Range
convert_page_range.description: Only convert a range of pages. The page number starts at 1.

convert_document_timeout.title: Convert Document Timeout
convert_document_timeout.description: The timeout for processing each document, in seconds.

convert_abort_on_error.title: Convert Abort On Error
convert_abort_on_error.description: Abort on error if enabled. Boolean. Optional, defaults to false.

convert_do_table_structure.title: Convert Do Table Structure
convert_do_table_structure.description: If enabled, the table structure will be extracted. Boolean. Optional, defaults to true.

convert_include_images.title: Convert Include Images
convert_include_images.description: If enabled, images will be extracted from the document. Boolean. Optional, defaults to true.

convert_images_scale.title: Convert Images Scale
convert_images_scale.description: Scale factor for images. Float. Optional, defaults to 2.0.

convert_md_page_break_placeholder.title: Convert Md Page Break Placeholder
convert_md_page_break_placeholder.description: Add this placeholder between pages in the markdown output.

convert_do_code_enrichment.title: Convert Do Code Enrichment
convert_do_code_enrichment.description: If enabled, perform OCR code enrichment. Boolean. Optional, defaults to false.

convert_do_formula_enrichment.title: Convert Do Formula Enrichment
convert_do_formula_enrichment.description: If enabled, perform formula OCR, return LaTeX code. Boolean. Optional, defaults to false.

convert_do_picture_classification.title: Convert Do Picture Classification
convert_do_picture_classification.description: If enabled, classify pictures in documents. Boolean. Optional, defaults to false.

convert_do_chart_extraction.title: Convert Do Chart Extraction
convert_do_chart_extraction.description: If enabled, extract numeric data from charts. Boolean. Optional, defaults to false.

convert_do_picture_description.title: Convert Do Picture Description
convert_do_picture_description.description: If enabled, describe pictures in documents. Boolean. Optional, defaults to false.

convert_picture_description_area_thresho.title: Convert Picture Description Area Threshold
convert_picture_description_area_thresho.description: Minimum percentage of the area for a picture to be processed with the models.

convert_picture_description_local.title: Convert Picture Description Local
convert_picture_description_local.description: DEPRECATED: Options for running a local vision-language model in the picture description. The parameters refer to a model hosted on Hugging Face. This parameter is mutually exclusive with picture_description_api. Please migrate to picture_description_preset or picture_description_custom_config.
examples: {"repo_id": "ibm-granite/granite-vision-3.2-2b", "prompt": "Describe this image in a few sentences.", "generation_config": {"max_new_tokens": 200, "do_sample": false}, "classification_allow": null, "classification_deny": null, "classification_min_confidence": 0.0}

{"repo_id": "HuggingFaceTB/SmolVLM-256M-Instruct", "prompt": "Describe this image in a few sentences.", "generation_config": {"max_new_tokens": 200, "do_sample": false}, "classification_allow": null, "classification_deny": null, "classification_min_confidence": 0.0}

convert_picture_description_api.title: Convert Picture Description Api
convert_picture_description_api.description: DEPRECATED: API details for using a vision-language model in the picture description. This parameter is mutually exclusive with picture_description_local. Please migrate to picture_description_preset or picture_description_custom_config.
examples: {"url": "http://localhost:1234/v1/chat/completions", "headers": {}, "params": {"model": "granite3.2-vision:2b"}, "timeout": 20.0, "concurrency": 1, "prompt": "Describe this image in a few sentences.", "classification_allow": null, "classification_deny": null, "classification_min_confidence": 0.0}

{"url": "http://localhost:11434/v1/chat/completions", "headers": {}, "params": {"model": "granite3.2-vision:2b"}, "timeout": 20.0, "concurrency": 1, "prompt": "Describe this image in a few sentences.", "classification_allow": null, "classification_deny": null, "classification_min_confidence": 0.0}

convert_vlm_pipeline_model.description: DEPRECATED: Preset of local and API models for the vlm pipeline. This parameter is mutually exclusive with vlm_pipeline_model_local and vlm_pipeline_model_api. Use the other options for more parameters. Please migrate to vlm_pipeline_preset or vlm_pipeline_custom_config.

convert_vlm_pipeline_model_local.title: Convert Vlm Pipeline Model Local
convert_vlm_pipeline_model_local.description: DEPRECATED: Options for running a local vision-language model for the vlm pipeline. The parameters refer to a model hosted on Hugging Face. This parameter is mutually exclusive with vlm_pipeline_model_api and vlm_pipeline_model. Please migrate to vlm_pipeline_preset or vlm_pipeline_custom_config.
examples: {"repo_id": "ibm-granite/granite-vision-3.2-2b", "prompt": "Convert this page to markdown. Do not miss any text and only output the bare markdown!", "scale": 2.0, "response_format": "markdown", "inference_framework": "transformers", "transformers_model_type": "automodel-vision2seq", "extra_generation_config": {}, "temperature": 0.0}

convert_vlm_pipeline_model_api.title: Convert Vlm Pipeline Model Api
convert_vlm_pipeline_model_api.description: DEPRECATED: API details for using a vision-language model for the vlm pipeline. This parameter is mutually exclusive with vlm_pipeline_model_local and vlm_pipeline_model. Please migrate to vlm_pipeline_preset or vlm_pipeline_custom_config.

convert_vlm_pipeline_preset.title: Convert Vlm Pipeline Preset
convert_vlm_pipeline_preset.description: Preset ID to use (e.g., "default", "granite_docling"). Use "default" for stable, admin-controlled configuration.

convert_vlm_pipeline_custom_config.title: Convert Vlm Pipeline Custom Config
convert_vlm_pipeline_custom_config.description: Custom VLM configuration including model spec and engine options. Only available if admin allows it. Must include 'model_spec' and 'engine_options'.

convert_picture_description_custom_confi.title: Convert Picture Description Custom Config
convert_picture_description_custom_confi.description: Custom picture description configuration including model spec and engine options.

convert_code_formula_custom_config.title: Convert Code Formula Custom Config
convert_code_formula_custom_config.description: Custom code/formula extraction configuration including model spec and engine options.

convert_table_structure_custom_config.title: Convert Table Structure Custom Config
convert_table_structure_custom_config.description: Custom configuration for table structure model. Use this to specify a non-default kind with its options. The 'kind' field in the config dict determines which table structure implementation to use. If not specified, uses the default kind with preset configuration.

convert_layout_custom_config.title: Convert Layout Custom Config
convert_layout_custom_config.description: Custom configuration for layout model. Use this to specify a non-default kind with its options. The 'kind' field in the config dict determines which layout implementation to use. If not specified, uses the default kind with preset configuration.

chunking_use_markdown_tables.title: Chunking Use Markdown Tables
chunking_use_markdown_tables.description: Use markdown table format instead of triplets for table serialization.

chunking_include_raw_text.description: Include both raw_text and text (contextualized) in response. If False, only text is included.

ChartBar.title: ChartBar
ChartBar.description:
Represents a bar in a bar chart.

Attributes:
    label (str): The label for the bar.
    values (float): The value associated with the bar.

ChartLine.title: ChartLine
ChartLine.description:
Represents a line in a line chart.

Attributes:
    label (str): The label for the line.
    values (list[tuple[float, float]]): A list of (x, y) coordinate pairs
        representing the line's data points.

ChartPoint.title: ChartPoint
ChartPoint.description:
Represents a point in a scatter chart.

Attributes:
    value (Tuple[float, float]): A (x, y) coordinate pair representing a point in a
        chart.

ChartSlice.title: ChartSlice
ChartSlice.description:
Represents a slice in a pie chart.

Attributes:
    label (str): The label for the slice.
    value (float): The value represented by the slice.

ChartStackedBar.title: ChartStackedBar
ChartStackedBar.description:
Represents a stacked bar in a stacked bar chart.

Attributes:
    label (list[str]): The labels for the stacked bars. Multiple values are stored
        in cases where the chart is "double stacked," meaning bars are stacked both
        horizontally and vertically.
    values (list[tuple[str, int]]): A list of values representing different segments
        of the stacked bar along with their label.

text.title: Text
text.description: The chunk text with structural context (headers, formatting)

raw_text.title: Raw Text

PdfBackend.title: PdfBackend
PdfBackend.description:
Available PDF parsing backends for document processing.

Different backends offer varying levels of text extraction quality, layout
preservation, and processing speed. Choose based on your document complexity
and quality requirements.

Attributes:
    PYPDFIUM2: Standard PDF parser using PyPDFium2 library. Fast and
        reliable for basic text extraction.
    DOCLING_PARSE: Docling Parse backend providing enhanced layout
        analysis, structure preservation, and advanced table detection.
        This is the recommended backend for most use cases.
    DLPARSE_V1: Deprecated. Maps to `DOCLING_PARSE`.
    DLPARSE_V2: Deprecated. Maps to `DOCLING_PARSE`.
    DLPARSE_V4: Deprecated. Maps to `DOCLING_PARSE`.

classification_min_confidence.description: Minimum classification confidence score (0.0-1.0) required for a picture to be processed. Pictures with classification confidence below this threshold are skipped. Higher values ensure only confidently classified images are described. Range: 0.0 (no filtering) to 1.0 (maximum confidence).

PictureDescriptionVlmEngineOptions.title: PictureDescriptionVlmEngineOptions
PictureDescriptionVlmEngineOptions.description:
Configuration for VLM runtime-based picture description.

This is the new implementation that uses the pluggable runtime system with preset support.
Supports all runtime types (Transformers, MLX, API, etc.) through the unified runtime interface.

Use `from_preset()` to create instances from registered presets.

Examples:
    # Use preset with default runtime
    options = PictureDescriptionVlmEngineOptions.from_preset("smolvlm")

    # Use preset with runtime override
    from docling.datamodel.vlm_engine_options import MlxVlmEngineOptions, VlmEngineType
    options = PictureDescriptionVlmEngineOptions.from_preset(
        "smolvlm",
        engine_options=MlxVlmEngineOptions(engine_type=VlmEngineType.MLX)
    )

ProcessingPipeline.title: ProcessingPipeline
ProcessingPipeline.description:
Available document processing pipeline types for different use cases.

Each pipeline is optimized for specific document types and processing requirements.
Select the appropriate pipeline based on your input format and desired output.

Attributes:
    LEGACY: Legacy pipeline for backward compatibility with older document processing workflows.
    STANDARD: Standard pipeline for general document processing (PDF, DOCX, images, etc.) with layout analysis.
    VLM: Vision-Language Model pipeline for advanced document understanding using multimodal AI models.
    ASR: Automatic Speech Recognition pipeline for audio and video transcription to text.
